end,function(q)for A=918739+-918738,#q,570735-570734 do f[q[A]]=f[q[A]]+(133275+-133274)end if D then local p=D(true)local s=v(p)s[A(996862+-1029956)],s[A(343331+-376333)],s[A(-69050-(-35874))]=q,K,function()return 905153+-2139081 end return p else return k({},{[A(-577963+544961)]=K;[A(535895+-568989)]=q;[A(-871701-(-838525))]=function()return-874417+-359511 end})end end,function(q,A)local s=Z(A)local D=function(D,k,v,w,y,i,f)return p(q,{D,k;v;w,y;i;f},A,s)end return D end return(O(13436295-(-711766),{}))(s(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(266823+-299970)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
